# render-detail

Per-plugin structure section in the plugin detail pane. Contributes a
`PluginView.Section` (id `structure`) that reads `node.facets["structure"]`
and renders a flag row: an info badge for a self-declared composition root and
warning badges for each non-standard folder and stray top-level source file.
Returns `null` when the plugin is structurally conformant (no anomalies).
